title: Tier It
description: Tier IT is a mod for Minecraft  that adds tiered item rolls to equipment, tools, weapons, mounts, and vehicles.
body:
# Tier IT

Tier IT is inspired by [Tiered](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiered), but expands the idea into a broader item tier system with more supported item types, deeper roll logic, reforging, mount and vehicle effects, and runtime stats beyond vanilla item attributes.

Weapons, tools, armor, mount gear, and vehicles can now roll different tiers, from simple flawed items to powerful Unique pieces. Every tier changes the item with real gameplay modifiers, making loot, crafting, and reforging feel more varied and meaningful.

## Features

- Six item tiers: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary, and Unique
- Random tier rolls on supported crafted and looted items
- Reforging through a custom anvil tab
- Tiered weapons, tools, armor, mount gear, harnesses, boats, and minecarts
- Positive and negative stat combinations
- Archetype-style rolls for higher tiers
- Vanilla-like tooltips that show what changed
- Runtime effects for stats Minecraft normally does not support as item attributes

## Supported Items

Tier IT currently supports:

- Swords, axes, spears, tridents, and maces
- Bows and crossbows
- Pickaxes, shovels, hoes, and shears
- Player armor
- Horse armor, nautilus armor, and wolf armor
- Saddles and harnesses
- Boats, rafts, chest boats, and minecarts

## Reforging

If you do not like a roll, you can reroll eligible tiered items through the Reforge tab in the anvil interface. Reforging consumes amethyst and a material related to the item.

## Beta Notice

Tier IT is currently in beta. Core systems are playable, but balance and edge cases may still change as the mod is tested more widely.
